category_sources: Official FLTK README describes FLTK as a cross-platform C++ GUI toolkit.
source_facts.description says it is a cross-platform C++ GUI toolkit.
display_name_sources: Official FLTK documentation page and GitHub README use the name FLTK.
source_facts.homepage is the official fltk.org site.
docs_sources: Official fltk.org documentation page lists current stable release documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/fltk/fltk, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official FLTK README mentions cross-platform GUI support and OpenGL support.
source_facts.description identifies a C++ GUI toolkit.
